user_query:
I’m preparing a quantitative appendix for my lecture on Brunelleschi. Please do the following using only the local files provided:

Inputs:
- input/measurements.csv
- input/notes_quotations.md
- draft/lecture_notes.md

Tasks and deliverables:
1) Compute overall statistics from input/measurements.csv and write them to output/overall_summary.csv with exactly these columns: total_records (int), distinct_structures (int), mean_span_m (2 decimals), min_span_m (2 decimals), max_span_m (2 decimals), mean_thickness_m (2 decimals), year_min (int), year_max (int).

2) Compute per-structure aggregates and write output/structure_summary.csv with exactly these columns: structure_name, city, records (int), mean_span_m (2 decimals), min_span_m (2 decimals), max_span_m (2 decimals), mean_thickness_m (2 decimals), year_min (int), year_max (int), quote_excerpt. For quote_excerpt, read input/notes_quotations.md and, when a section heading matches the structure_name exactly, take the first blockquoted line under that heading, trimmed, and truncate it to 140 characters (append "..." only if truncated). If no matching quote exists, leave quote_excerpt empty.

3) Edit draft/lecture_notes.md by replacing only the content between the markers <!-- AUTO_SUMMARY_START --> and <!-- AUTO_SUMMARY_END -->, preserving everything else verbatim. Insert, in this order:
   - One paragraph of 80–120 words summarizing the findings. It must include: the mean span (2 decimals), the name of the structure with the largest max_span_m and its value (2 decimals), and the data coverage as YEAR_MIN-YEAR_MAX.
   - A bullet list of the overall metrics from output/overall_summary.csv with the same field names and values.
   - A Markdown table with columns exactly: Structure | City | Records | Mean Span (m) | Min Span (m) | Max Span (m) | Mean Thickness (m) | Years Covered | Quote. Use per-structure values you computed; Years Covered should be YEAR_MIN-YEAR_MAX; Quote should be the quote_excerpt.
Save the edited file as output/lecture_notes_updated.md.

Notes:
- Use only the provided inputs. Round only the fields specified. Ensure there is exactly one row per unique structure_name in output/structure_summary.csv. Do not alter any other parts of the draft file.
 All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
